subcodes.first_line: Your letter hath reached the Wronged One, and the servant in attendance hath read it before His face. We have answered thee with that which thou shalt find therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک لدی المظلوم و قرئه العبد الحاضر لدی الوجه اجبناک بما یجد منه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proclamation to the people of the world, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
